# Heatmap

Plots a labeled matrix of color-coded cells with sequential or diverging ramps that follow the theme and color mode.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/heatmap
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="heatmap" example={0} code={`<PerformanceHeatMap />`} />

```tsx
<PerformanceHeatMap />
```
